subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned before the Wronged One! O Riḍá! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of all mankind! Upon receiving these felicitous tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور لدی المظلوم یا رضا علیک بهاء الله مولی الوری بمجرد خبر خیر اثر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
